data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁12
data.summary: [8/2(Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-gam
data.body:
[8/2(Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 9
▶ Period of Restriction: Permanent
More details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100120
